global.title: Global
ideas: how much pushback or synthesis you prefer
artifact style that should apply across skills
global.boundary: Keep global guidance additive. Skill-specific Strike mechanics still win.

brainstorm.title: Brainstorm
brainstorm.target: how brainstorm explores, challenges, narrows, and saves ideas
ideas: preferred audience, problem, or constraint framing
extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
brainstorm.boundary: Do not turn brainstorm into grill, spec, slice, or implementation.

grill.title: Grill
grill.target: how grill asks decision questions and pressure-tests tradeoffs
ideas: how rejected paths should be recorded
technical, product, or workflow tradeoffs to emphasize
extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
grill.boundary: Do not turn grill into spec, slice, implementation, readiness review, or retro.

research.title: Research
research.target: how research gathers evidence and summarizes findings
ideas: how deep to go before spec
extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
research.boundary: Do not turn research into spec, slice, implementation, readiness review, or retro.

spec.title: Spec
spec.target: how spec writes durable project rules and success-check detail
ideas: extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
spec.boundary: Do not turn spec into slicing, implementation planning, review, readiness review, or retro.

spec-review.title: Spec Review
spec-review.target: how spec-review checks and safely repairs the project spec before slicing
ideas: when to ask instead of safely repairing the spec
read-only review lenses such as security, accessibility, data integrity, or edge cases
spec-review.boundary: Do not turn spec-review into new product discovery, broad research, slicing, implementation planning, implementation, or approval.

slice.title: Slice
slice.target: how slice turns a spec into buildable vertical phases
ideas: extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
slice.boundary: Do not turn slice into phase-plan, implementation, review, readiness review, or retro.

slice-review.title: Slice Review
slice-review.target: how slice-review checks and safely repairs phase plans before implementation
ideas: local slicing risks to check before build planning
when to reroute upstream instead of editing phase plans
read-only review lenses such as dependencies, testability, rollout, or edge cases
slice-review.boundary: Do not turn slice-review into spec rewriting, phase planning, implementation, implementation review, or approval.

phase-research.title: Phase Research
phase-research.target: how phase-research checks tactical evidence before build planning
ideas: extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
phase-research.boundary: Do not turn phase-research into phase-plan, implementation, review, readiness review, or retro.

phase-plan.title: Phase Plan
phase-plan.target: how phase-plan writes build briefs and verification plans
ideas: extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
phase-plan.boundary: Do not turn phase-plan into implementation, review, readiness review, or retro.

phase-build.title: Phase Build
phase-build.target: how phase-build implements a planned phase and records build evidence
ideas: how strongly to prefer existing repo patterns
extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
phase-build.boundary: Do not expand beyond the selected phase, skip verification, change board mechanics, create review, readiness, or retro artifacts, or commit.

phase-review.title: Phase Review
phase-review.target: how phase-review checks one built phase and records review findings
ideas: repo-specific quality, test, and risk checks
what should be blocking vs non-blocking
read-only review lenses such as accessibility, security, data integrity, UI polish, or edge cases
phase-review.boundary: Do not edit implementation files, create fixes, skip evidence checks, move board state with unresolved blockers, or commit.

phase-fix.title: Phase Fix
phase-fix.target: how phase-fix repairs blocking review or readiness findings
ideas: extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
phase-fix.boundary: Do not fix outside blocking review or readiness findings, rerun review or readiness review, move the board out of implementation, or commit.

readiness-review.title: Readiness Review
readiness-review.target: how readiness-review judges readiness against the Strike spec
ideas: read-only review lenses such as release readiness, human signoff, operational risk, or documentation
extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
readiness-review.boundary: Do not lower readiness gates, edit implementation files, create retro files, or move to retro with unresolved fixes or human checks.

retro.title: Retro
retro.target: what retro captures after accepted work
ideas: how concise the retro should be
extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
retro.boundary: Do not reopen implementation, review, or readiness work from retro customization.

demo.title: Demo
demo.target: how demo creates small planning demos for decision support
ideas: extra docs or assets with clear per-project or shared intent and a repo-safe save path
demo.boundary: Do not turn demo into production implementation or make demos required for any stage.

language.title: Language
language.target: how language reviews terminology and domain wording
ideas: how uncertain terms should be discussed
when to ask before changing UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md
language.boundary: Do not apply uncertain glossary changes without user approval.
